basic_details.job_title: CGPSC Assistant Librarian Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The latest Chhattisgarh Public Service Commission (CGPSC) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Assistant Librarian posts! Published on 21 April 2026 at www.psc.cg.gov.in, this new recruitment drive offers 7 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the age group of 21 to 40 years (for Chhattisgarh residents) and possessing a Bachelor's degree in Library Science or Library and Information Science can apply online from 24 April 2026 to 23 May 2026. Find all details about the CGPSC Assistant Librarian new vacancy 2026, including eligibility, online form, and notification PDF here.

age_limit.age_details: Min: 21 years, Max: 40 years (for Chhattisgarh residents)
age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 40 years (for Chhattisgarh residents) Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules: Chhattisgarh Residents: 40 years SC/ST/OBC (Non-Creamy Layer): 5 years Local Women of Chhattisgarh: 10 years Permanent/Temporary Employees of Chhattisgarh Govt.: 5 years

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in Library Science or Library and Information Science
qualification.details: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's degree in Library Science or Library and Information Science from a recognized university.

salary_details.details: Pay Matrix Level 10 (Rs. 43200-136500) Dearness Allowance and other allowances as per state government rules.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CGPSC Assistant Librarian Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 23-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CGPSC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CGPSC सहायक ग्रंथपाल Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the CGPSC सहायक ग्रंथपाल Recruitment 2026 is 23 May 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum educational qualification required for the सहायक ग्रंथपाल post?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required for the सहायक ग्रंथपाल post is a Bachelor's degree in Library Science or Library and Information Science from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the सहायक ग्रंथपाल post?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 21 years and the maximum age limit is 30 years. However, for Chhattisgarh residents, the maximum age limit is extended to 40 years, with applicable age relaxations for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the सहायक ग्रंथपाल post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies announced for the सहायक ग्रंथपाल post by the Chhattisgarh Public Service Commission (CGPSC).

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the CGPSC सहायक ग्रंथपाल Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 300 for SC/ST/OBC (Non-Creamy Layer)/PWD candidates of Chhattisgarh, and Rs. 400 for UR and Other State Candidates.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the सहायक ग्रंथपाल post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the सहायक ग्रंथपाल post will receive a salary in Pay Matrix Level 10, ranging from Rs. 43,200 to Rs. 1,36,500, along with Dearness Allowance and other admissible allowances.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the सहायक ग्रंथपाल recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the सहायक ग्रंथपाल recruitment will involve a Preliminary Examination, followed by a Main Examination (Written), and finally a Viva-voce.

faq.question: Q8. When will the online application process start?
faq.answer: The online application process for the CGPSC सहायक ग्रंथपाल Recruitment 2026 will commence on 24 April 2026.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any age relaxation for candidates belonging to reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is applicable for candidates belonging to reserved categories. SC/ST/OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) candidates can avail 5 years of relaxation, and local women of Chhattisgarh can get 10 years of relaxation.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page, or by visiting the official website of the Chhattisgarh Public Service Commission (CGPSC).

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the CGPSC सहायक ग्रंथपाल Recruitment 2026?
